ValidationRule.description: Due Date must be in the future
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISNEW(), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Client_delivery_request', ISPICKVAL(Data_Solutions_Type__c, 'Recurring Report Request'), Due_date__c < TODAY() +21 ), AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISNEW(), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Client_delivery_request', ISPICKVAL(Data_Solutions_Type__c, 'Ad Hoc Data & Client Reporting Request'), Due_date__c < TODAY() +2)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot enter a Due Date that is less than 21 days for Data Solution Recurring Report Requests. For Ad Hoc Data & Client Reporting Requests, the due date must be at least 48h in the future.
